title: Problem
description: A named issue observed in ≥1 regions, decomposed in Forrester systems-model style (problem_systems_model_v1). Migrated from content/auckland/schema/problem.schema.json. Structural changes from Auckland: (1) driver_ids and camp_ids removed — those edges originate from Driver and Camp respectively, not from Problem; (2) evidence_ids → claim_ids (E_evidenced_by); (3) source_ids removed — source reachability is Claim-mediated (P3 ratification 2026-04-25); (4) manifests_in added (E_manifests_in); (5) theme added. Cross-entity invariants P3 (subgraph completeness) and P15 (figure-in-narrative) are Layer 1c Python predicates.

section.description: Top-level section label for URL routing (e.g. 'housing').

parent.description: ID of a parent Problem, if this is a sub-problem.

manifests_in.description: Regions where this Problem is observed. ≥1 required. Materialises to E_manifests_in.

narrative.description: Structured narrative sections rendered on the Problem page. ≥1 required. Figure identifiers in narrative.figure must appear in the figures list (P15 — Python).

figure.description: Figure identifier cross-referenced in body text (P15).

claim_ids.description: Claims evidencing this Problem. ≥1 required (P3 — cross-entity Python). Materialises to E_evidenced_by.
